##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Lighter green thin tabular crystals forming v-twins perched on darker green blocky atacamite, associated with black paratacamite. Twinned by 120 deg rotation around [2 0 1]
